Aloo Baingan Bharta

Jun 25, 2015

Aloo Baingan Bharta/Mashed Potato - Brinjal

Office is taking its Toll on me. Every day, it’s turning to be a long, long day till 9 pm or more. While returning today I felt like eating something simple. Aloo-Baingan Bharta is one of those every day comfort food, which is a healthy option for your hunger and it’s easy and quick to make.

The Aloo - Baingan Bharta recipe goes like this:

Ingredients: 

  1. Baingan/ Eggplant - 1 large
  2. Potatoes - 3 Boiled and Peeled off
  3. Onion -1 finely chopped large sized
  4. Garlic - 1 tsp finely chopped
  5. Tomato - 1 large finely chopped
  6. Green Chilies - 1 finely chopped
  7. Vegetable Oil- 1 tbsp
  8. Salt - According to the taste
  9. Cumin Seeds - 1 tsp
  10. Turmeric - 1 pinch
  11. Cumin Powder - 1tsp
  12. Coriander Powder - 1 tsp
  13. Red chili Powder - 1 tsp

Aloo Baingan Bharta Ingredients

Steps of Preparation:

  1. Roast the Eggplant on the gas stove.

    Roasting of Eggplant

  2. Peel off the Eggplant once it cools down.

    Smoked Eggplant and Boiled Potatoes

  3. Mash the Smoky roasted Eggplant and the potatoes.
  4. Heat a pan, add the oil to it.
  5. Add the cumin seeds and let it splutter.
  6. Add the Onions and saute it till it’s golden brown.
  7. Then add the tomatoes and powdered spices (cumin powder, coriander powder, red chili powder) and saute it till the tomatoes are cooked and spices releases oil.

  8. Add the mashed Potato and Eggplant and mix it well with the spices.

    Aloo Baingan Bharta

  9. Cook it for 2-3 minutes and serve it hot with Chapati

Aloo Baingan Bharta served with hot Chapatis

 

Aloo Baingan Bharta

Recipe Type: Side Dish

Cuisine: Indian

Author: Shreemaa Bhadra

Prep time: 15 mins

Cook time: 15 mins

Total time: 30 mins

Aloo Baingan Bharta is lightly spiced comfort food which is made out of limited spices and healthy Eggplant. It’s a great accomplishment to Chapatis.

Ingredients

Instructions
